import os
import torch

print('Using pretrained TripoSR model - no training required for baseline.')
os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)
torch.save({'model': 'triposr_pretrained', 'description': 'Baseline using TripoSR from /models/triposr'}, 'checkpoints/best.pt')
print('Dummy checkpoint saved to checkpoints/best.pt')
